changelog: Work, Inbox, Tickets, Clients, Reports, and Search now use the shared helpdesk flow contracts
Ticket detail layout, long headings, timeline modals, and primary actions were tightened for a more stable workspace UI
Reports gained shared rate, adjustment, export, and live-total modules for billing review parity
Email notification policy and formatting were consolidated to reduce duplicate ticket emails
Self-hosted update packaging now builds a structured files/ update archive from the release script
